title: State Capitol, front elevation detail, Juneau, Alaska
description: Front elevation detail of the Alaska State Capitol building in downtown Juneau, showing the four tall marble columns of the main entrance and the carved 'ALASKA STATE CAPITOL' inscription above the doors.
alt: Front entrance of the Alaska State Capitol building with four marble columns and carved inscription
